cta.description: Create a contract renewal request online with clear, fast steps.

whatIs.title: What is the domestic worker contract renewal service?
whatIs.body: The domestic worker contract renewal service lets you renew the contract online through the platform easily, prepare the required documents, and track the request status until you receive the final copy—without repeated in-person visits.

beforeStart.title: Before you start: what do you need?
beforeStart.body: To help your request get approved quickly, make sure you have the following documents ready:

steps.title: Steps to submit the request
steps.body: Follow these steps to submit your renewal request correctly:

items.submit: Review details and submit the request

tracking.title: How do you track the request status?
tracking.body: After submitting, you can track the status from the order tracking page using the request number or mobile number, with clear updates for every stage until renewal is complete.

payment.title: When is payment made?
payment.body: Payment is made electronically after the details are reviewed and the request is approved. Fee details and payment methods appear in the platform before you confirm.

receive.title: When do you receive the final contract?
receive.body: After payment and completion of the process, the final contract is issued and made available for collection based on the delivery method you chose, with an instant notification when it is ready.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: We are committed to protecting your personal data and documents that you provide through the platform, and we explain on this page how data is collected, used, and stored according to the highest privacy and security standards.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.subtitle: Policy overview
introduction.body: This privacy policy explains how the Hala Wa Sahla platform collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use domestic worker contract renewal services. We handle your information transparently and responsibly in accordance with the regulations applicable in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
introduction.note: By using the platform, you agree to the collection and processing of your data in accordance with this policy.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.subtitle: When and with whom we share your data
dataSharing.body: We do not sell your personal data to any third party. We may share the minimum data necessary with competent authorities or approved service providers only to complete the contract renewal request or to comply with legal requirements.
dataSharing.note: Data is shared only to the extent necessary to deliver the service or comply with regulations.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.subtitle: Security measures in place
dataProtection.body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or alteration, including for example:

items.encryption: Encrypting sensitive data in transit and at rest
items.accessControl: Restricting access permissions to operational need only
items.secureStorage: Storing documents in secure and approved storage environments
items.monitoring: Continuously monitoring systems to detect unusual activity

notifications.title: Notifications & Communication
notifications.subtitle: Channels we use to contact you
notifications.body: We may use your mobile number or email to send notifications about your request status or any actions required from you. We may also send educational or marketing messages related to platform services when you consent, and you can request to stop them at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.subtitle: Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve the user experience, analyze platform performance, and remember your preferences. You can manage cookie settings through your browser, noting that disabling some cookies may affect certain platform features.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.subtitle: How long information is kept
dataRetention.body: We retain your data and documents for as long as needed to deliver the service and meet legal and accounting obligations. After the retention purpose ends, data is securely deleted or anonymized according to approved policies.
dataRetention.note: You may request deletion of your data when there is no legal need to retain it.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Privacy inquiries
contact.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how your data is processed, you can contact the support team through the communication channels available on the platform. We will aim to respond to your request as soon as possible.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.description: Please read the terms and conditions carefully before using the platform's services, as this page explains the user's rights and obligations and how domestic worker contract renewal services are used.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.subtitle: Agreement to use
acceptance.body: By using the Hala Wa Sahla platform or submitting a domestic worker contract renewal request through it, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be fully bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please stop using the platform immediately.
acceptance.note: Continued use of the platform constitutes explicit acceptance of these terms and conditions.

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.subtitle: Employer obligations
responsibilities.body: When using the platform's services, the user agrees to:

items.accurateInfo: Provide accurate and correct information when creating a request
items.lawfulUse: Use the platform only for lawful purposes related to domestic worker contract renewal
items.accountSecurity: Keep login credentials confidential and not share them with others
items.compliance: Comply with the laws and regulations applicable in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

dataAccuracy.title: Data & Document Accuracy
dataAccuracy.subtitle: Correctness of uploaded information
dataAccuracy.body: The user is fully responsible for the accuracy of the data and documents uploaded through the platform, including the national ID, passport, previous contract, and any other required documents. The platform is not liable for any delay or rejection resulting from incorrect or incomplete data or documents.
dataAccuracy.note: Please carefully review all data before submitting your request to ensure it is processed quickly.

payment.title: Payment & Fees
payment.subtitle: Payment mechanism
payment.body: Service fees are clearly displayed before payment is completed. The amount is collected when the request is submitted through the payment methods available on the platform, including mada, Visa, Mastercard, and Apple Pay. Fees are considered final only after successful payment confirmation.

cancellation.title: Cancellation & Refund
cancellation.subtitle: Cancellation policy
cancellation.body: Users may request cancellation before official renewal procedures begin. If processing with the competent authorities has already started, a full or partial refund may not be available depending on the request status and stage of completion.
cancellation.note: Fees cannot be refunded after renewal procedures are completed or the request is submitted to official authorities.

tracking.title: Order Tracking & Notifications
tracking.subtitle: Following request status
tracking.body: The platform allows users to follow their request status through the order tracking page. Notifications may also be sent via SMS or email to update the user on progress and any required actions.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.subtitle: Content and trademark rights
intellectualProperty.body: All content, designs, logos, trademarks, text, and software belonging to the Hala Wa Sahla platform are the exclusive property of the platform and are protected under the intellectual property laws applicable in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Copying or using them without prior permission is prohibited.
